data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures that data is protected from the client to the server.
data.technical_spec: TLS protocol employed for data transmissions.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Assumes threat presence and verifies at every stage of interaction.
data.technical_spec: Lay layers of security per session authentication and log validation.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Ensures the right users have access to appropriate resources.
data.technical_spec: Integration with OAuth 2.0 for secure login procedures.

data.title: Threat Detection and Monitoring
data.description: Continuously monitors network traffic and user behavior for anomalies.
data.technical_spec: Uses AI and machine learning models for timely threat detection.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.technical_spec: Third-party penetration testing and vulnerability scanning.
